name: Kinship Type Scale
description: An interactive reference of the Kinship typographic system — display, headings, body, small, and caption sizes with a dark mode toggle.
prompt: Build a small prototype showing the Kinship typographic scale with a dark mode toggle.
full_prompt: Build a small prototype showing the Kinship typographic scale with a dark mode toggle.
what_made_it_special: Internal worktree test prototype — built in parallel with colour-palette to validate the git worktree isolation strategy. Shows the full Kinship type scale (Display through Caption) with real example copy from the product, plus a dark mode toggle.
design_decisions: Built as a parallel worktree test alongside colour-palette to validate the git worktree isolation strategy
Shows 7 levels: Display (3rem/800), H1 (2.25rem/700), H2 (1.75rem/600), H3 (1.375rem/600), Body (1rem/400), Small (0.875rem/400), Caption (0.75rem/400)
Each level uses real Kinship product copy (e.g. 'Students grow here.' for Display, 'Reading — Grade 3' for H1)
Dark mode toggle switches between cream background (light) and ink background (dark) — tests both contexts
Horizontal rule dividers between each level for visual separation
tech_notes: Client component with useState for dark mode toggle
No external dependencies beyond Tailwind + CSS variables

slack_thread.name: Hermes
slack_thread.content: Self-initiated test prototype — built to validate the parallel git worktree strategy. Created alongside colour-palette to confirm two simultaneous worktree builds don't conflict.
